markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Gem to discuss potential collaboration on organic growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX, led by Marcel Santilli, offers AI-powered content creation and organic growth strategies, having achieved significant results for clients (e.g., 10x visibility increase for Augment Code in 2 months).](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Gem, represented by Jeff Beckham (Head of Marketing), is seeking to improve their organic growth strategy and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to schedule a deeper dive session with additional team members to explore potential collaboration and share more insights specific to Gem's space.](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach to Organic Growth

  - [Utilizes AI-powered content creation with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Focuses on audience-first approach, mapping topics to personas and jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Creates daily content across various formats (blogs, newsletters, catalogs)](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Emphasizes visibility in AI-generated answers (e.g., ChatGPT) as a key strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Implements detailed workflows for research, writing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Gem's Current Organic Growth Situation

  - [Approximately 200 blog posts, with only 1-3% of traffic coming from blogs/resources](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Most traffic driven by brand searches rather than non-branded organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Top-performing article is outdated (2 years old), indicating room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Jeff acknowledges the need for faster progress and expertise in new organic growth methods](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Content Quality and AI Generation Concerns

  - [Jeff expressed concerns about AI-generated content potentially flooding the market with low-quality material](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Marcel demonstrated how GrowthX combines AI generation with human expertise to maintain high quality](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Showed examples of detailed, informative content created for clients in various industries](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Gem's competitors in the ATS space include Greenhouse, Ashby, and Findem](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Marcel noted that many competitors in Gem's space are not fully leveraging content strategies, presenting an opportunity for Gem](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

### Next Steps Discussion

  - [Agreed to schedule a more in-depth session with additional team members from Gem](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare insights specific to Gem's industry for the follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel and Jeff to coordinate via email to schedule a deeper dive session](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare industry-specific insights for Gem's space](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Jeff to invite relevant team members for the follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Both parties to explore potential collaboration opportunities in more detail during the next session](https://fathom.video/share/wNMuDjxZj2x1sPyzX_BHuGywTpx1ojzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
